sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113253" key="xamailexh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμαι-λεχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n113253.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on the ground,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κοίτα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.413</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
